FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.SETTINGS.Enabled.Name: Enable bridge
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.SETTINGS.Enabled.Hint: Connect this Foundry tab to the local relay on the configured URL. Disable to fully shut down the WebSocket.
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.SETTINGS.RelayUrl.Name: Relay URL
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.SETTINGS.RelayUrl.Hint: WebSocket URL of the local relay. Default: ws://127.0.0.1:7878. Only localhost addresses make sense; remote URLs are not supported by design.
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.NOTIFY.Refused: Foundry-Claude bridge refused by relay (check capability config).
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.CHAT.Title: Claude Code Chat
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.CHAT.NotConnected: Unable to Connect to Claude Code, Please Check Connections
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.CHAT.StatusNoListener: Connected to the relay, but no Claude Code listener is running. Start a /loop in Claude Code — messages will queue until then.
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.CHAT.StatusDisconnected: Lost connection to the relay. Check that the relay process is running and the bridge module is enabled.
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.CHAT.Placeholder: Type a message for Claude Code…  (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline, /exit stops the listener)
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.CHAT.ReplyWhileClosed: Claude Code replied, but the chat box is closed. Reopen "Open Claude Code Chat" to see it.
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.CHAT.ConfirmWrite: Claude Code wants to make a change — review
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.CHAT.ConfirmAgain: Are you sure? This is destructive. Approve again to proceed.
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.WORKSHOP.Title: Claude Macro Workshop
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.WORKSHOP.NotConnected: Unable to Connect to Claude Code, Please Check Connections
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.WORKSHOP.NoMacro: No macro loaded — ask Claude to load one, or type a new one and name it.
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.WORKSHOP.EditorPlaceholde: Macro source — ask Claude in the box below to load, refine, debug, or refactor a macro.
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.WORKSHOP.AskPlaceholder: e.g. "load the macro Draft Meta Scroll", "refactor what's in the box", "why does this throw?"  (Enter to send)
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.WORKSHOP.PushedNew: Claude placed new content in the editor.
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.WORKSHOP.PushedClosed: Claude pushed code to the Claude Macro Workshop — open it to see it.
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.WORKSHOP.NoListener: No Claude Code listener — start a /loop.
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.WORKSHOP.CfWrite: Claude wants to make a change — review
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.WORKSHOP.CfAgain: Are you sure? This is destructive. Approve again to proceed.
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.WORKSHOP.EmptySave: Nothing to save — the editor is empty.
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.WORKSHOP.NeedName: Enter a macro name to save a new macro.
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.WORKSHOP.ProtectedRefuse: Refused: that name belongs to a bridge GUI macro and can't be overwritten here.
FOUNDRY_BRIDGE.WORKSHOP.ManagedRefuse: Refused: that is a bridge-managed macro. Save under a different name instead.
